short_summary: Iran deal signed Friday; US focus shifts
rationale: The US-Iran peace deal signing expected Friday and continued US diplomatic focus on Iran raises concern about Western attention and resources being diverted from Ukraine — continuation of elevated baseline.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal signing expected Friday; ceasefire holds
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy remains focused on Iran deal finalization, sustaining concern that Washington's attention and resources may be diverted away from Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: Claims Israel's Beirut strike pushed Trump on Iran announcement
top_events.summary: Reports that external military action influenced the US-Iran deal timeline suggest the deal's stability is uncertain, which has indirect implications for US reliability as Ukraine's backer.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian war grief has no direct military or policy impact on Ukraine, but signals continued Russian public awareness of war casualties.
